allow: Bash(AWS_PROFILE=griddog aws ec2 describe-subnets --filters "Name=vpc-id,Values=vpc-0169d769cd12ce2ae" --region ap-southeast-1 --query 'Subnets[].[Tags[?Key==`Name`]|[0].Value,SubnetId,CidrBlock,AvailabilityZone,MapPublicIpOnLaunch]' --output table)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=griddog aws ec2 describe-security-groups --filters "Name=vpc-id,Values=vpc-0169d769cd12ce2ae" --region ap-southeast-1 --query 'SecurityGroups[].[GroupName,GroupId]' --output table)
Bash(AWS_PROFILE=griddog aws elbv2 describe-load-balancers --region ap-southeast-1 --query 'LoadBalancers[].[LoadBalancerName,DNSName,Type,Scheme]' --output table)
